Convert a set of tool classes (by name) to a list of schemas.

HttpClient - Class in ai.alumnium.client

toObject() - Method in interface ai.alumnium.client.Data
Convert into a plain Java structure (String, Long, Double, Boolean, or List) suitable for direct comparison in tests with assertj / equals().
ToolDescription - Annotation Interface in ai.alumnium.tool.annotation
Attaches a class-level description to a tool record.
ToolField - Annotation Interface in ai.alumnium.tool.annotation
Documents a tool record component so
invalid reference 
ToolToSchemaConverter
can emit a meaningful JSON schema.

tools() - Method in record class ai.alumnium.result.DoStep
Returns the value of the tools record component.
ToolToSchemaConverter - Class in ai.alumnium.tool
Converts tool records into the JSON schema format expected by the Alumnium server.
